today.restBody: Recovery is part of the plan. Enjoy the day off — your streak is safe.
today.completedBody: Nice work. See you next session.
today.noPlanBody: Finish your profile to get a personalized plan.
today.atRisk: Train today to keep your streak!

water.title: Water today
water.help: Water nudges stop for the day once you reach your goal.

health.title: Watch & band data
health.empty: Connect a Garmin watch or fit band by importing its .FIT files — activities and daily wellness (steps, resting heart rate) show up here. Export them from your watch via USB (GARMIN/Activity and GARMIN/Monitor folders) or from Garmin Connect. Everything stays on this device.

guide.title: Garmin, without the cloud
guide.intro: Pair a Garmin watch straight to this phone over Bluetooth — no Garmin account, no data leaving your device. The bridge app is Gadgetbridge: open source, offline, no sign-up.
guide.s1b: Good choices: Forerunner 165 / 255 / 265 / 965, Venu & Venu Sq, Vívoactive, Fénix 6/7/8. Check gadgetbridge.org → Gadgets → Garmin for the full list.
guide.s2b: Install the F-Droid store (f-droid.org), then Gadgetbridge from it. Skip Google Play versions and do NOT install Garmin Connect — the watch must not be paired to Garmin's own app.
guide.s3b: Gadgetbridge → + → pick your watch → confirm the code on the watch. If the watch was ever paired to Garmin Connect before, factory-reset it first (Settings → System → Reset).
guide.s4b: Pull down in Gadgetbridge to fetch activities and daily data from the watch. Workouts are saved as .FIT files on this phone — open an activity and use its share/export button, or let them collect in Gadgetbridge's export folder.
guide.s5b: Here on Progress → Import .FIT files, select the exported files. Steps, resting heart rate and workouts appear above. Importing the same file twice is safe.
guide.s6b: In Android settings, exclude Gadgetbridge from battery optimization so background sync keeps working — same as you did for Termux.
guide.note: Everything stays on this phone: watch → Bluetooth → Gadgetbridge → Fit-ingo. No account is created anywhere.

quick.doneBody: Nice bonus — your body thanks you!

progress.title: Your progress
progress.noWeight: Log your weight to see the trend.

settings.title: Settings
settings.reminderHelp: Reminders are sent by the app running on this device. Keep it running in the background.
settings.regenerateHelp: Build a fresh week based on your recent workouts.
settings.about: Fit-ingo runs entirely on your device. Your data never leaves it.
settings.resetConfirmBody: This wipes your profile, plan, logs and settings. This cannot be undone.
